summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shop page fixes and Retreat modal functionality. All 13 specified features working correctly including 3-step checkout flow, multiple product images with navigation, payment options, and retreat modal close button.

design_issues.issue: Occasional overlay interception when clicking quantity +/- buttons during rapid testing

passed_tests: Product cards equal height alignment with min-h-[56px]
Products have 2-3 images with dot indicators
Image navigation arrows appear on hover and function correctly
Add to cart works with toast notifications
Cart sidebar opens and displays products correctly
Proceed to checkout navigates to address form
Address form accepts all required fields (name, email, phone, address, city, pincode)
Continue to Payment button advances to payment selection
Payment step shows UPI, Card, and COD options with selection
Order summary displays correctly in payment step
Place order button becomes enabled when payment method selected
Retreat waitlist modal opens and closes properly with X button
Product modal opens with image thumbnails and navigation
Multiple products can be added to cart successfully
Mobile responsiveness works for product grid and cart
Retreat gallery horizontal scroll navigation functions
Waitlist form accepts input and enables submit button
